title.en: There is one thing mentioned in this extradimen...

content.en:
This extradimensional knowledge contains a lot of knowledge, including how to use extradimensional things to explode extradimensional means.

However, if you want to use extradimensional things to exert extradimensional means, you must first fuse extradimensional things, and if the fusion fails, it is very likely to fall or be assimilated by extradimensional things.

There is one thing mentioned in this extradimensional knowledge.

Extradimensional Assimilation!

Extradimensional assimilation is terrifying, even more terrifying than demon seeding.

When it comes to the cultivation of a high-level realm god, it is difficult to be transformed into a demon seed, but the assimilation of the extra-dimensional is enough to affect the peak realm god.

Once assimilated by the extradimensional, one becomes an extradimensional slave without any consciousness.

"If you succeed in fusing extra-dimensional things, you will be able to use extra-dimensional things to burst out super-dimensional means, and your strength will be very strong, but if you fail to assimilate, you will fall or be assimilated by super-dimensional things, which is very costly. Those supreme forces know so much about this that they have definitely tried. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

It may be that the Supreme Forces have obtained extradimensional things before, but it is not that the stump is so powerful, so it is easy to obtain.

If this is really the case, then there is definitely a peak realm god among the 05 supreme forces who have fused with extradimensional things.

Such a pinnacle realm god, his strength is absolutely terrifying.

But the supreme forces are also groping step by step, and those peak realm gods who fuse extradimensional things may also pay a very heavy price, and the situation is not good.

......

A mysterious place.

Some pinnacle realm gods have obtained the secret technique of extradimensional absorption, which is being discussed at the moment.

"What a subtle secret technique, is this really created by a high-level realm god in a short period of time?"

"It doesn't have to be created by that high-level realm god, maybe somewhere did you get the secret art inheritance, and then I changed it a little bit and became such a secret art. "

"This possibility also exists, but the origin of this secret technique has nothing to do with us, the main thing is that it really helps us improve the situation?"

"I'll take a look at the cultivation first. "

Not long after, the pinnacle realm god said, "The secret technique of extradimensional absorption is indeed useful to me, but the side effects are also relatively large. Of course, I don't care about this side effect anymore, and with it, I can probably continue a few more extradimensional epochs. "

"Does this extra-dimensional absorption secret technique help to fuse the Kun Realm Wood Stump?" a peak realm god said curiously.

"It can't be useful. Another pinnacle realm god said: "The Kun Realm wood stump that fell to our eternal realm is a medium-level extra-dimensional thing, and our ability to fuse low-level extra-dimensional things is already the limit, and if we dare to fuse medium-level extra-dimensional things, it is to seek death." This time, it was only expected that they would be able to create a useful secret technique that could resist the explosion of power from the remnants of the Kun Realm Wood and thus take away the Kun Realm Wood. Otherwise, forcibly taking away the Kun Realm Wood will only be assimilated by the Kun Realm Wood Super Dimension. "

"It's too difficult to take away the Kunjie Wood Stump, if it is a Kun Realm Wood Stump in an introverted state, it won't be hurt by it, but now the power of the Kun Realm Wood Stump is constantly releasing and exploding, which is equivalent to attacking all the time, it's too difficult to take it away. Unless we really master the extradimensional means before we can take it, there is no hope. "

"No matter if there is any hope, we have to try it, and even if we can't take away the stump of the Kun Realm Wood, there are other gains, such as this extra-dimensional secret technique is very good, it will help us. "

"You have to keep an eye on the abyss of the demon seed, their peak demon seeds are even crazier, maybe they will find us desperately!"

"Don't worry, those peak demon seeds don't dare to mess around, otherwise they will be assimilated by the extradimensional, and they will really lose consciousness and become extradimensional slaves. "

Ye Tian didn't know what these peak realm gods were discussing, at this moment, while absorbing the super-dimensional power of refining the Kun Realm Wood Stump, he was using the Tianyan Roulette to continue to deduce and perfect the super-dimensional absorption secret technique.

The side effects of the Extra-Dimensional Extraction Secret Technique he created at the beginning were too great, so he naturally had to perfect it, at least to reduce or completely eliminate the side effects of the Extradimensional Absorption Secret Technique!

Time flies.

Ye Tian perfected step by step, and the super-dimensional secret technique was really perfected by him, and the cost of side effects was getting lower and lower.

Gradually, the 200 million years of the Dao Era passed.

At this time, the Extradimensional Absorption Secret Technique has been quite perfected, and the side effects are already very low.

However, he was still not satisfied, and wanted to continue to perfect the extradimensional drawing secret technique.

But on this day, something happened to me.

Those peak demon seeds and high-level demon seeds in the Demon Seed Abyss suddenly launched an attack, and they combined all their power into one item, attacking the Kun Realm Wood Stump, instead of attacking them, the peak realm gods and high-level realm gods.

"Demon Seed Abyss, you can't !!! crazy"

The pinnacle realm gods of the supreme power were shocked.

In an instant, everything around was shrouded in white light.

This moment. []

A high-ranking realm god fled from here, and they didn't dare to linger any longer.

Ye Tian was not afraid of falling, but the void he was in was shattered inch by inch, and there was no point in staying here, so he retreated slightly.

"The Demon Seed Abyss is attacking this extradimensional thing, why did you do that?"

Ye Tian didn't quite understand.

After thinking about it, there was only one possibility, and that was to smash this extradimensional thing, and then he could take away the fragments of this extradimensional thing.

Moreover, it can also prevent this extradimensional object from expanding the eternal realm.

Otherwise, if it continues to grow like this, the Eternal Realm may even be able to surpass the peak!

Soon.

The more 667 came more and more peak realm gods and peak demon species participated in the battle, and no one knew what the battle situation was, they were all distorted by extradimensional power.

Not to mention high-level realm gods, even ordinary peak realm gods may be killed.

I don't know how long it has been.

Suddenly.

The extradimensional artifact, the Kunjie Wood Fragment, was shattered and turned into many smaller pieces.

At this time, a fragment flew towards Ye Tian's side.

"This piece of debris is very threatening!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

The previous Kunjie wood fragment was bursting with extradimensional power all the time, but this smaller fragment not only contained very little extradimensional power, but also did not burst out with extradimensional power all the time, so it could be easily taken away.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian burst out of strength and grabbed it quickly.

Swish!

This Kun Realm Wood Fragment was grabbed by Ye Tian, but he immediately fled quickly.

In fact, he was not the only one who snatched the fragments of extradimensional things, there were also many high-level realm gods who intervened.

Therefore, the supreme power cannot control it.

Ye Tian didn't continue to watch the play, and he didn't know the situation of other high-level realm gods snatching, he just snatched a fragment.

He kept running away until he returned to the Eternal Realm Terran Endless Kingdom Alliance, and then he breathed a sigh of relief.
